title: Canopy Platform Registry
description: Defines supported MCP client platforms and their configuration format for canopy setup wizard.

config_path.description: Path to MCP config file relative to $HOME

servers_key.description: JSON key path to the MCP servers object where canopy entry is added

canopy_entry.description: The canopy MCP server entry value in the platform's expected format

deprecated_keys.description: Old MCP server keys to remove during setup (e.g. task-trigger)
